questionHtml:
Which event occurs in the first division of meiosis?

A.  Synthesis of DNA

B.  Pulling apart of sister chromatids

C.  Halving of the chromosome number

D.  Division of centromeres

meta.title: Which event occurs in the first division of meiosis? A. Synthesis of DNA B. Pulling apart of sister chromatids C. Halving of the chromosome number D. Division of centromeres
